CHANGE RECORD 
 
When the quality of the products changes, the QuID is updated and a row is added to this table. The third 
column specifies which sections or sub -sections have been updated. The fourth column should mention 
the version of the product to which the change applies.

ACRONYM TABLE 
Acronym Definition 
ADR, ION, Aeg, LEV, SWM, 
NWM, TYR, ATL, ALB 
Sub-regions: Adriatic, Ionian, Aegean, Levantine, Southwest Med, 
Northwest Med, Tyrrhenian, Atlantic, Alboran 
CMEMS Copernicus Marine Environment Monitoring Service 
CORR Pearson Correlation Coefficient  
EAN Estimated Accuracy Number 
ECMWF European Centre for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts 
ETOPO2 2-Minute Gridded Global Relief Data (NOAA NGDC) 
GEBCO General Bathymetric Chart of the Oceans 
GLO-WAVES Copernicus Marine Global Wave Model component 
HCMR Hellenic Centre for Marine Research 
Hm0 Spectral Significant Wave Height (zero-moment) 
IFREMER  Institut Français de Recherche pour l’Exploitation de la Mer 
ISRPA  Istituto Superiore per la Protezione e la Ricerca Ambientale (Italy) 
LR_SLOPE Linear Regression Slope 
Mdir Mean Wave Direction 
Med-MFC Mediterranean Monitoring and Forecasting Centre 
MWP Mean Wave Period 
NGDC National Geophysical Data Center (NOAA) 
O.I.  Optimal Interpolation 
PQ Product Quality 
PU Production Unit 
RMSD Root-Mean-Square Difference 
SWH Significant Wave Height 
SI Scatter Index 
TAC Thematic Assembly Centre  
Tm02 Spectral moments (0,2) wave period 
Tp Peak Wave Period 
U10 Wind speed at 10 m height 
WAM WAve Model (third-generation spectral wave model)

28 May 2025 
2.5 
 
    Page 4/ 60 
KEY DEFINITIONS 
 
Term Definition 
Bias Mean difference between model and observations, indicating 
systematic over- or under-estimation. 
Class 4 metrics GODAE metrics (Hernandez et al., 2009), where Class4 measures the 
performance of the reanalysis system, its capability to describe the 
processes 
Correlation Coefficient 
(CORR) 
Statistical measure of linear agreement between model and 
observations. 
Linear Regression Slope 
(LR_SLOPE) 
Coefficient describing proportionality between model and observed 
values. 
Monitoring and Forecasting 
Centre (MFC) 
Regional centre within CMEMS responsible for the production of 
reanalysis and forecast products. 
Product Quality 
Information Document 
(QUID) 
Describes the scientific validation, accuracy, and limitations of a CMEMS 
product. 
Production Unit (PU) The operational unit responsible for producing, maintaining, an

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Quality Information Document (QUID) for MEDSEA_MULTIYEAR_WAV_006_012, detailing the product's history, updates, and validation process for wave data in the Mediterranean Sea.
